stories.title: France Fan Favorite but AI Predicts Spain for World Cup Glory
stories.desc: France leads in BofA fan survey with 40% betting on Les Bleus, but Microsoft's Copilot AI predicts Spain equally likely to win. Tournament kicks off June 11 with 48 teams.

stories.title: World Cup 2026 Squad Deadlines Announced
stories.desc: Teams must submit preliminary lists by May 11 with 35-55 players. Final 23-26 player squads due May 25-June 1. FIFA announces official rosters June 2.

stories.title: Shakira Releases World Cup 2026 Anthem 'Dai Dai'
stories.desc: Colombian superstar teases official anthem featuring Burna Boy, filmed at Maracaná Stadium. Her second World Cup anthem after 2010's Waka Waka.

stories.title: Panini Launches Biggest World Cup Sticker Album Ever
stories.desc: Record 980 stickers across 112 pages for 48 teams. Launched April 28 at Wembley Stadium. Seven stickers per pack, priced at £1.25.

stories.title: 14 Exclusive Panini Stickers Only in Coca-Cola Bottles
stories.desc: Special Coca-Cola x Panini partnership features 12 exclusive stickers hidden in 20-oz bottle labels from mid-May, including Kane, Yamal, and Martínez.

stories.title: World Cup Prize Pool Reaches $871 Million
stories.desc: Each of 48 teams receives minimum $12.5M. Preparation payments rise to $2.5M, qualification to $10M. Tournament expected to generate $80B in global output.
